title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates building a $481k/year product using Claude Code in 45 days with zero coding experience. The video outlines five steps for rapid application development: starting with the problem, knowing where to engineer vs use existing solutions, learning technical vocabulary to communicate with AI, deliberate pacing, and identifying critical failure points.
